REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Oct-03-2016 Continued To Oct-12-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Clerks Entry Of Default And For Leave To Defend The Action
Off Calendar Sep-21-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Robert F. Cohen, Esq. (800-492-2657) specially appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party, Cach LLC

Attorney, Craig C. Daniel of Gluck Daniel LLP (415-510-2509) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party, Ainslee Tillbrook

Ainslee Tillbrook, sworn, testifies in her own behalf. The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter.

DEFENDANT AINSLEE TILLBROOK'S Motion For Relief From Clerks Entry Of Default And For Leave To Defend The Action is GRANTED. Court credits Ms. Tillbrook's testimony and finds that she did not receive notice of this lawsuit until this year. Prevailing party is directed to submit a [proposed] written order tracking the Court's ruling, verbatim and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR #5976, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jun-30-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Defendant Ainslee Tillbrook telephone number 415-307-3881 in Propia Persona.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

Ms. Tillbrook is sworn in and testifies under oath. Ainslee Tillbrook's CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is granted. Funds held by the levying officer are to be returned to Ms. Tillbrook. The Court will prepare a form of order.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
